repo_notes.content: Keep it really simple. No advanced guides. No need to get into depth with the Anka Build Cloud. Just the basics of using Anka CLI for now.

pages.title: Overview
pages.purpose: Introduce the Anka ecosystem at a high level: what Anka is, the two main product layers (Anka Virtualization CLI and Anka Build Cloud), how they relate to each other, and what kinds of users and workflows they support.

page_notes.content: Avoid mentioning pkg files and just stick with the binary names; for anka CLI, it's 'anka'
